title: No hace falta
subtitle: Say something is not necessary.
overview: No hace falta means it is not necessary.
Use hace falta for need in a general way.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: It is not necessary to book.
It is not necessary for you to come.

items.en: It is not necessary to pay now.

items.es: Hace falta más tiempo para aprender bien.
items.en: More time is needed to learn well.
It is not necessary to bring food.

items.es: Creo que hace falta otra explicación.
items.en: I think another explanation is needed.

items.es: No hace falta que me llames hoy.
items.en: It is not necessary for you to call me today.
